title: Graph Layout Algorithm
scenario: Generate a Python function that takes as input a graph represented as an adjacency list and returns the positions of the nodes in 2D space. The function should use the spring layout algorithm to position the nodes. The prompt should be under 300 characters.
constraints: Use the spring layout algorithm to position the nodes
Return the positions of the nodes in 2D space

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically correct.
Check if the spring layout algorithm correctly positions the nodes.
Check if the code is readable and follows standard Python coding practices.
